title: Add semantic memory dependencies and DB bootstrap primitives
description: Add required runtime dependencies and create the initial memory backend primitives needed to open a shared database, enable WAL mode, load sqlite-vec, resolve/cache the embedding model, and report basic stats.
acceptance_criteria: `pyproject.toml` includes required memory dependencies in main project dependencies.
`src/agent_takt/memory.py` defines idempotent DB/bootstrap helpers needed by later memory operations.
`init_db()` creates the DB path, enables WAL mode, and prepares schema/extension loading without requiring later CLI work to duplicate setup.
A basic `stats()` implementation can inspect the initialized DB state.
